violations.text: The door to the outside, located between the dining room and kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025
The dumpster and oil recycle bin area has an accumulation of grease, vegetation, and debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

The kitchen prep area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025
Establishment will need to provide parasite destruction forms from sushi fish supplier at Reinspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (vegetable peelers, bowls on clean storage rack) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

Tofu, chicken, and shrimp observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

Working containers of some ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

The door to the outside, located between the dining room and kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025
Food observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

Utensils in the kitchen are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean on counters and shelves. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025
The dumpster and oil recycle bin area have an accumulation of grease, trash, vegetation, and a large panel of glass. The area must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

The wall in the food prep area are constructed of unfinished drywall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025
The floor and wall junctures in the food prep area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025
Hand sinks in the front area and kitchen are lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

The door to the outside, located in the front is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023
Equipment in kitchen (pots and dry storage containers) are too large to be adequately cleaned and sanitized in the 3 bay sink or dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

One wall in the mop sink room is constructed of drywall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023
